name: Abbott v. United States
question: Does a mandatory minimum sentence provided by 18 U.S.C § 924(c)(1)A) run concurrently or consecutively to another count that carries a longer than ordinary mandatory minimum sentence?
description: A case in which the Court held that a defendant who receives a mandatory minimum sentence for using or carrying a firearm in furtherance of a drug trafficking crime can serve that sentence consecutively with any other term of imprisonment.
